title: Update node-sass to version 3.10.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [node-sass](https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-sass) just published its new version 3.10.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency node-sass
New version 3.10.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of node-sass. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/releases/tag/v3.10.0)

Sass Spec

In v3.9.0 started publishing our test suite to npm. This caused issues for users on systems with poor unicode support or file path length limits. This changed was reverted until we could engineer a better solution.

In this release we've migrated our test suite to a separate npm module which is now a devDependency. With change users will only download the test suite on an opt-in basis by explicitly install devDependencies.

@nschonni, @xzyfer, #1686

Misc

  • Update ISSUE_TEMPLATE (@nschonni, #1717)
  • Replace util._extend with lodash.assign (@nschonni, #1711)
  • Bump ESLint to v3 (@nschonni, #1700)
--- The new version differs by 14 commits . - [`aec7049`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/aec7049bef2e5262083784b3fc5b6f7d97fb005c) Update changelog - [`24e2e2c`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/24e2e2c7b79b743e5f4a829c7dacfe372d635c8f) 3.10.0 - [`128646e`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/128646e651402182c5e5e8b0612bcdc3de6cf99f) Merge pull request #1717 from nschonni/issue-template-update - [`eb8df02`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/eb8df022c182db2f45e2ba31638ecfa452afa631) Update ISSUE_TEMPLATE with Bootstrap format - [`105cca2`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/105cca21924beb111ca1866d82bc7bef8e79b2f9) Merge pull request #1711 from nschonni/util-extent-to-object-assign - [`ccfbbcb`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/ccfbbcb0ee5aa4ebf20e883caa58543d8611cebb) Merge pull request #1698 from nschonni/update-spec-runner - [`b27386d`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/b27386dfcdae4690de9ed1660fac8c0e54ef924a) Switch sass-spec submodule for NPM - [`0c709c1`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/0c709c1e5fb0a6ef20412f6dc353d0cb59ba1605) Merge pull request #1700 from nschonni/eslint-updates - [`61f42de`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/61f42dee63a8175cf2ccaa35e41ee243b3875074) Replace util._extend with lodash.assign - [`6dda1de`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/6dda1dedd82c983b1b08a05ec93f1e4f48034b6d) Merge pull request #1703 from sass/revert-1688-feat/publish-tests - [`0cdee5c`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/0cdee5c8ab121172d79424c595770ef788ee73a3) Revert "Publish tests to npm" - [`003819d`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/003819d368ae9b46f3a28a7e06cd46d1b207e0b3) sass-spec runs recursively as suites - [`05105ad`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/05105ad35cb96d882dddb8404db5b497a798c3b7) Bump ESLint to 3.x and fix errors - [`fb19917`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/fb199177c3397824f94b8a2e7797d51ade781119) Run ESLint turing script phase so build fails See the [full diff](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/compare/72af63e7faee466720cffc8e61e386bcbdfa4cb5...aec7049bef2e5262083784b3fc5b6f7d97fb005c). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
